 3088            // Validate <style> tag.
 03089            int styleHashCode = GetStyleHashCode(ref sourceText, srcIndex + 7, out srcOffset);
 03090            TMP_Style style = GetStyle(styleHashCode);

 03093            if (style == null || srcOffset == 0) return false;
 3094
 3095            // Increase style depth
 03096            m_TextStyleStackDepth += 1;
 3097

 03099            m_TextStyleStacks[m_TextStyleStackDepth].Push(style.hashCode);
 3100
 3101            // Replace <style> tag with opening definition
 03102            uint[] styleDefinition = style.styleOpeningTagArray;
 3103
 03104            InsertTextStyleInTextProcessingArray(ref charBuffer, ref writeIndex, styleDefinition);
 3105
 03106             m_TextStyleStackDepth -= 1;
 3107
 03108            return true;
 03109        }

 3181        /// <summary>
 3182        ///
 3183        /// </summary>
 3184        /// <param name="styleDefinition"></param>
 3185        /// <param name="readIndex"></param>
 3186        /// <returns></returns>
 3187        int GetMarkupTagHashCode(uint[] styleDefinition, int readIndex)
 03188        {
 03189            int hashCode = 0;
 03190            int maxReadIndex = readIndex + 16;
 03191            int styleDefinitionLength = styleDefinition.Length;
 3192
 03193            for (; readIndex < maxReadIndex && readIndex < styleDefinitionLength; readIndex++)
 03194            {
 03195                uint c = styleDefinition[readIndex];
 3196
 03197                if (c == '>' || c == '=' || c == ' ')
 03198                    return hashCode;
 3199
 03200                hashCode = ((hashCode << 5) + hashCode) ^ (int)TMP_TextParsingUtilities.ToUpperASCIIFast(c);
 03201            }
 3202
 03203            return hashCode;
 03204        }
 3205
 3206        /// <summary>
 3207        ///
 3208        /// </summary>
 3209        /// <param name="styleDefinition"></param>
 3210        /// <param name="readIndex"></param>
 3211        /// <returns></returns>
 3212        int GetMarkupTagHashCode(TextBackingContainer styleDefinition, int readIndex)
 03213        {
 03214            int hashCode = 0;
 03215            int maxReadIndex = readIndex + 16;
 03216            int styleDefinitionLength = styleDefinition.Capacity;
 3217
 03218            for (; readIndex < maxReadIndex && readIndex < styleDefinitionLength; readIndex++)
 03219            {
 03220                uint c = styleDefinition[readIndex];
 3221
 03222                if (c == '>' || c == '=' || c == ' ')
 03223                    return hashCode;
 3224
 03225                hashCode = ((hashCode << 5) + hashCode) ^ (int)TMP_TextParsingUtilities.ToUpperASCIIFast(c);
 03226            }
 3227
 03228            return hashCode;
 03229        }
 3230
 3231        /// <summary>
 3232        /// Get Hashcode for a given tag.
 3233        /// </summary>
 3234        /// <param name="text"></param>
 3235        /// <param name="index"></param>
 3236        /// <param name="closeIndex"></param>
 3237        /// <returns></returns>
 3238        int GetStyleHashCode(ref uint[] text, int index, out int closeIndex)
 03239        {
 03240            int hashCode = 0;
 03241            closeIndex = 0;
 3242
 03243            for (int i = index; i < text.Length; i++)
 03244            {
 3245                // Skip quote '"' character
 03246                if (text[i] == 34) continue;
 3247
 3248                // Break at '>'
 03249                if (text[i] == 62) { closeIndex = i; break; }
 3250
 03251                hashCode = (hashCode << 5) + hashCode ^ TMP_TextParsingUtilities.ToUpperASCIIFast((char)text[i]);
 03252            }
 3253
 03254            return hashCode;
 03255        }
 3256
 3257        /// <summary>
 3258        /// Get Hashcode for a given tag.
 3259        /// </summary>
 3260        /// <param name="text"></param>
 3261        /// <param name="index"></param>
 3262        /// <param name="closeIndex"></param>
 3263        /// <returns></returns>
 3264        int GetStyleHashCode(ref TextBackingContainer text, int index, out int closeIndex)
 03265        {
 03266            int hashCode = 0;
 03267            closeIndex = 0;
 3268
 03269            for (int i = index; i < text.Capacity; i++)
 03270            {
 3271                // Skip quote '"' character
 03272                if (text[i] == 34) continue;
 3273
 3274                // Break at '>'
 03275                if (text[i] == 62) { closeIndex = i; break; }
 3276
 03277                hashCode = (hashCode << 5) + hashCode ^ TMP_TextParsingUtilities.ToUpperASCIIFast((char)text[i]);
 03278            }
 3279
 03280            return hashCode;
 03281        }

 3306        private readonly MarkupAttribute[] m_TextMarkupAttributes = new MarkupAttribute[8];
 3307
 3308        bool TryPopulateTextMarkupAttributes(uint[] sourceText, ref int readIndex)
 3309        {
 3310            int srcReadIndex = readIndex;
 3311
 3312            int srcLength = sourceText.Length;
 3313            bool isPotentiallyValidMarkupElement = false;
 3314
 3315            byte readingFlag = 0;
 3316            bool isValueInQuotes = false;
 3317
 3318            int attributeIndex = 0;
 3319            m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].NameHashCode = 0; //5381;
 3320            m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].ValueHashCode = 0; //5381;
 3321            m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].ValueLength = 0;
 3322
 3323            // TODO : Add limit on tag search length and number of attributes
 3324            for (; readIndex < srcLength && sourceText[readIndex] != 0; readIndex++)
 3325            {
 3326                uint c = sourceText[readIndex];
 3327
 3328                if (c == '<')
 3329                {
 3330                    if (readIndex > srcReadIndex)
 3331                        break;
 3332
 3333                    continue;
 3334                }
 3335
 3336                // Check for closing tag
 3337                if (c == '>')
 3338                {
 3339                    isPotentiallyValidMarkupElement = true;
 3340                    break;
 3341                }
 3342
 3343                // Compute hashcode for Tag and Attribute names
 3344                if (readingFlag == 0)
 3345                {
 3346                    // Compute hashcode value for tag and attribute names
 3347                    if ((c >= 'A' && c <= 'Z') || (c >= 'a' && c <= 'z') || c == '/' || c == '-')
 3348                    {
 3349                        m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].NameHashCode = ((m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].N
 3350                        continue;
 3351                    }
 3352
 3353                    // Next - Determine the value and type.
 3354                    if (c == '=')
 3355                    {
 3356                        readingFlag = 1;
 3357                        continue;
 3358                    }
 3359
 3360                    // Special handling if using a short color tag like <#FF00FF>
 3361                    if (c == '#')
 3362                    {
 3363                        m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].NameHashCode = (int)MarkupTag.COLOR;
 3364                        m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].ValueStartIndex = readIndex;
 3365                        m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].ValueLength = 1;
 3366
 3367                        readingFlag = 2;
 3368                        continue;
 3369                    }
 3370
 3371                    // Space separates tag names from attributes
 3372                    // Reset next attribute before going to read it
 3373                    if (c == ' ')
 3374                    {
 3375                        // Early exit if attribute name hash code is zero
 3376                        if (m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].NameHashCode == 0)
 3377                            break;
 3378
 3379                        attributeIndex += 1;
 3380                        m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].NameHashCode = 0; //5381;
 3381                        m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].ValueHashCode = 0; //5381;
 3382                        m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].ValueLength = 0;
 3383                        continue;
 3384                    }
 3385
 3386                    break;
 3387                }
 3388
 3389                // Determine value type for tag and attribute with special handling for values contained in quotes
 3390                if (readingFlag == 1)
 3391                {
 3392                    isValueInQuotes = false;
 3393                    readingFlag = 2;
 3394
 3395                    // Check for format where value is enclosed in quotes.
 3396                    if (c == '"')
 3397                    {
 3398                        isValueInQuotes = true;
 3399                        continue;
 3400                    }
 3401                }
 3402
 3403                // Read value
 3404                if (readingFlag == 2)
 3405                {
 3406                    // We are done reading the value if we run into a quote.
 3407                    if (c == '"')
 3408                    {
 3409                        if (!isValueInQuotes)
 3410                            break;
 3411
 3412                        readingFlag = 0;
 3413                        continue;
 3414                    }
 3415
 3416                    // Also done reading the value if we run into a space when quotes are not being used.
 3417                    if (!isValueInQuotes && c == ' ')
 3418                    {
 3419                        attributeIndex += 1;
 3420                        m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].NameHashCode = 0; //5381;
 3421                        m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].ValueHashCode = 0; //5381;
 3422                        m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].ValueLength = 0;
 3423                        readingFlag = 0;
 3424                        continue;
 3425                    }
 3426
 3427                    if (m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].ValueLength == 0)
 3428                        m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].ValueStartIndex = readIndex;
 3429
 3430                    // Compute Hashcode value irrespective of the value type
 3431                    m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].ValueHashCode = ((m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].Valu
 3432
 3433                    m_TextMarkupAttributes[attributeIndex].ValueLength += 1;
 3434                }
 3435            }
 3436
 3437            return isPotentiallyValidMarkupElement;
 3438        }
 3439        */

 3441        /// <summary>
 3442        ///
 3443        /// </summary>
 3444        void ResizeInternalArray <T>(ref T[] array)
 63445        {
 63446            int size = Mathf.NextPowerOfTwo(array.Length + 1);
 3447
 63448            System.Array.Resize(ref array, size);
 63449        }
 3450
 3451        void ResizeInternalArray<T>(ref T[] array, int size)
 93452        {
 93453            size = Mathf.NextPowerOfTwo(size + 1);
 3454
 93455            System.Array.Resize(ref array, size);
 93456        }
 3457
 3458
 23843459        private readonly decimal[] k_Power = { 5e-1m, 5e-2m, 5e-3m, 5e-4m, 5e-5m, 5e-6m, 5e-7m, 5e-8m, 5e-9m, 5e-10m }; 
 3460
 3461
 3462        void AddFloatToInternalTextBackingArray(float value, int padding, int precision, ref int writeIndex)
 03463        {
 03464            if (value < 0)
 03465            {
 03466                m_TextBackingArray[writeIndex] = '-';
 03467                writeIndex += 1;
 03468                value = -value;
 03469            }
 3470
 3471            // Using decimal type due to floating point precision impacting formatting
 03472            decimal valueD = (decimal)value;
 3473
 3474            // Round up value to the specified prevision otherwise set precision to max.
 03475            if (padding == 0 && precision == 0)
 03476                precision = 9;
 3477            else
 03478                valueD += k_Power[Mathf.Min(9, precision)];
 3479
 03480            long integer = (long)valueD;
 3481
 03482            AddIntegerToInternalTextBackingArray(integer, padding, ref writeIndex);
 3483
 03484            if (precision > 0)
 03485            {
 03486                valueD -= integer;
 3487
 3488                // Add decimal point and values only if remainder is not zero.
 03489                if (valueD != 0)
 03490                {
 3491                    // Add decimal point
 03492                    m_TextBackingArray[writeIndex++] = '.';
 3493
 03494                    for (int p = 0; p < precision; p++)
 03495                    {
 03496                        valueD *= 10;
 03497                        long d = (long)valueD;
 3498
 03499                        m_TextBackingArray[writeIndex++] = (char)(d + 48);
 03500                        valueD -= d;
 3501
 03502                        if (valueD == 0)
 03503                            p = precision;
 03504                    }
 03505                }
 03506            }
 03507        }
 3508
 3509
 3510        /// <summary>
 3511        ///
 3512        /// </summary>
 3513        /// <param name="number"></param>
 3514        /// <param name="padding"></param>
 3515        /// <param name="writeIndex"></param>
 3516        void AddIntegerToInternalTextBackingArray(double number, int padding, ref int writeIndex)
 03517        {
 03518            int integralCount = 0;
 03519            int i = writeIndex;
 3520
 3521            do
 03522            {
 03523                m_TextBackingArray[i++] = (char)(number % 10 + 48);
 03524                number /= 10;
 03525                integralCount += 1;
 03526            } while (number > 0.999999999999999d || integralCount < padding);
 3527
 03528            int lastIndex = i;
 3529
 3530            //// Reverse string
 03531            while (writeIndex + 1 < i)
 03532            {
 03533                i -= 1;
 03534                uint t = m_TextBackingArray[writeIndex];
 03535                m_TextBackingArray[writeIndex] = m_TextBackingArray[i];
 03536                m_TextBackingArray[i] = t;
 03537                writeIndex += 1;
 03538            }
 03539            writeIndex = lastIndex;
 03540        }
 3541
 3542
 3543        string InternalTextBackingArrayToString()
 03544        {
 03545            char[] array = new char[m_TextBackingArray.Count];
 3546
 03547            for (int i = 0; i < m_TextBackingArray.Capacity; i++)
 03548            {
 03549                char c = (char)m_TextBackingArray[i];
 3550
 03551                if (c == 0)
 03552                    break;
 3553
 03554                array[i] = c;
 03555            }
 3556
 03557            m_IsTextBackingStringDirty = false;
 3558
 03559            return new string(array);
 03560        }

 3563        /// <summary>
 3564        /// Method used to determine the number of visible characters and required buffer allocations.
 3565        /// </summary>
 3566        /// <param name="unicodeChars"></param>
 3567        /// <returns></returns>
 03568        internal virtual int SetArraySizes(TextProcessingElement[] unicodeChars) { return 0; }

 3570
 3571        /// <summary>
 3572        /// Function to Calculate the Preferred Width and Height of the text object.
 3573        /// </summary>
 3574        /// <returns></returns>
 3575        public Vector2 GetPreferredValues()
 03576        {
 3577            // CALCULATE PREFERRED WIDTH
 03578            m_isPreferredWidthDirty = true;
 03579            float preferredWidth = GetPreferredWidth();

 3581            // CALCULATE PREFERRED HEIGHT

 04815                fontSize = Mathf.Min((int)(fontSize * 20 + 0.5f) / 20f, m_fontSizeMax);
 4816
 4817                //Debug.Log("[" + m_AutoSizeIterationCount + "] Increasing Point Size from [" + m_minFontSize.ToString("
 04818                return Vector2.zero;
 4819            }
 4820            #endregion End Auto-sizing Check
 4821
 04822            m_IsAutoSizePointSizeSet = true;
 4823
 04824            m_isCalculatingPreferredValues = false;
 4825
 4826            // Adjust Preferred Width and Height to account for Margins.
 04827            m_RenderedWidth += m_margin.x > 0 ? m_margin.x : 0;
 04828            m_RenderedWidth += m_margin.z > 0 ? m_margin.z : 0;
 4829
 04830            m_RenderedHeight += m_margin.y > 0 ? m_margin.y : 0;
 04831            m_RenderedHeight += m_margin.w > 0 ? m_margin.w : 0;
 4832
 4833            // Round Preferred Values to nearest 5/100.
 04834            m_RenderedWidth = (int)(m_RenderedWidth * 100 + 1f) / 100f;
 04835            m_RenderedHeight = (int)(m_RenderedHeight * 100 + 1f) / 100f;
 4836
 4837            //Debug.Log("Preferred Values: (" + renderedWidth + ", " + renderedHeight + ") with Recursive count of " + m
 4838
 04839            return new Vector2(m_RenderedWidth, m_RenderedHeight);
 04840        }

 4843        /// <summary>

 04849        internal virtual Rect GetCanvasSpaceClippingRect() { return Rect.zero; }

 4851        /// <summary>
 4852        /// Method which returns the bounds of the text object;
 4853        /// </summary>
 4854        /// <returns></returns>
 4855        protected Bounds GetTextBounds()
 04856        {
 04857            if (m_textInfo == null || m_textInfo.characterCount > m_textInfo.characterInfo.Length) return new Bounds();
 4858
 04859            Extents extent = new Extents(k_LargePositiveVector2, k_LargeNegativeVector2);
 4860
 04861            for (int i = 0; i < m_textInfo.characterCount && i < m_textInfo.characterInfo.Length; i++)
 04862            {
 04863                if (!m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].isVisible)
 04864                    continue;
 4865
 04866                extent.min.x = Mathf.Min(extent.min.x, m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].origin);
 04867                extent.min.y = Mathf.Min(extent.min.y, m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].descender);
 4868
 04869                extent.max.x = Mathf.Max(extent.max.x, m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].xAdvance);
 04870                extent.max.y = Mathf.Max(extent.max.y, m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].ascender);
 04871            }
 4872
 4873            Vector2 size;
 04874            size.x = extent.max.x - extent.min.x;
 04875            size.y = extent.max.y - extent.min.y;
 4876
 04877            Vector3 center = (extent.min + extent.max) / 2;
 4878
 04879            return new Bounds(center, size);
 04880        }
 4881
 4882
 4883        /// <summary>
 4884        /// Method which returns the bounds of the text object;
 4885        /// </summary>
 4886        /// <param name="onlyVisibleCharacters"></param>
 4887        /// <returns></returns>
 4888        protected Bounds GetTextBounds(bool onlyVisibleCharacters)
 04889        {
 04890            if (m_textInfo == null) return new Bounds();
 4891
 04892            Extents extent = new Extents(k_LargePositiveVector2, k_LargeNegativeVector2);
 4893
 04894            for (int i = 0; i < m_textInfo.characterCount; i++)
 04895            {
 04896                if ((i > maxVisibleCharacters || m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].lineNumber > m_maxVisibleLines) && onlyVisi
 04897                    break;
 4898
 04899                if (onlyVisibleCharacters && !m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].isVisible)
 04900                    continue;
 4901
 04902                extent.min.x = Mathf.Min(extent.min.x, m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].origin);
 04903                extent.min.y = Mathf.Min(extent.min.y, m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].descender);
 4904
 04905                extent.max.x = Mathf.Max(extent.max.x, m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].xAdvance);
 04906                extent.max.y = Mathf.Max(extent.max.y, m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].ascender);
 04907            }
 4908
 4909            Vector2 size;
 04910            size.x = extent.max.x - extent.min.x;
 04911            size.y = extent.max.y - extent.min.y;
 4912
 04913            Vector2 center = (extent.min + extent.max) / 2;
 4914
 04915            return new Bounds(center, size);
 04916        }

 4919        /// <summary>
 4920        /// Method to adjust line spacing as a result of using different fonts or font point size.
 4921        /// </summary>
 4922        /// <param name="startIndex"></param>
 4923        /// <param name="endIndex"></param>
 4924        /// <param name="offset"></param>
 4925        // Function to offset vertices position to account for line spacing changes.
 4926        protected void AdjustLineOffset(int startIndex, int endIndex, float offset)
 04927        {
 04928            Vector3 vertexOffset = new Vector3(0, offset, 0);
 4929
 04930            for (int i = startIndex; i <= endIndex; i++)
 04931            {
 04932                m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].bottomLeft -= vertexOffset;
 04933                m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].topLeft -= vertexOffset;
 04934                m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].topRight -= vertexOffset;
 04935                m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].bottomRight -= vertexOffset;
 4936
 04937                m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].ascender -= vertexOffset.y;
 04938                m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].baseLine -= vertexOffset.y;
 04939                m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].descender -= vertexOffset.y;
 4940
 04941                if (m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].isVisible)
 04942                {
 04943                    m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].vertex_BL.position -= vertexOffset;
 04944                    m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].vertex_TL.position -= vertexOffset;
 04945                    m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].vertex_TR.position -= vertexOffset;
 04946                    m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].vertex_BR.position -= vertexOffset;
 04947                }
 04948            }
 04949        }

 4951
 4952        /// <summary>
 4953        /// Function to increase the size of the Line Extents Array.
 4954        /// </summary>
 4955        /// <param name="size"></param>
 4956        protected void ResizeLineExtents(int size)
 04957        {
 04958            size = size > 1024 ? size + 256 : Mathf.NextPowerOfTwo(size + 1);
 4959
 04960            TMP_LineInfo[] temp_lineInfo = new TMP_LineInfo[size];
 04961            for (int i = 0; i < size; i++)
 04962            {
 04963                if (i < m_textInfo.lineInfo.Length)
 04964                    temp_lineInfo[i] = m_textInfo.lineInfo[i];
 4965                else
 04966                {
 04967                    temp_lineInfo[i].lineExtents.min = k_LargePositiveVector2;
 04968                    temp_lineInfo[i].lineExtents.max = k_LargeNegativeVector2;
 4969
 04970                    temp_lineInfo[i].ascender = k_LargeNegativeFloat;
 04971                    temp_lineInfo[i].descender = k_LargePositiveFloat;
 04972                }
 04973            }
 4974
 04975            m_textInfo.lineInfo = temp_lineInfo;
 04976        }
 14977        protected static Vector2 k_LargePositiveVector2 = new Vector2(TMP_Math.INT_MAX, TMP_Math.INT_MAX);
 14978        protected static Vector2 k_LargeNegativeVector2 = new Vector2(TMP_Math.INT_MIN, TMP_Math.INT_MIN);
 14979        protected static float k_LargePositiveFloat = TMP_Math.FLOAT_MAX;
 14980        protected static float k_LargeNegativeFloat = TMP_Math.FLOAT_MIN;
 14981        protected static int k_LargePositiveInt = TMP_Math.INT_MAX;
 14982        protected static int k_LargeNegativeInt = TMP_Math.INT_MIN;

 05005            {

 05009            }

 05018                maxVisibleDescender = m_ElementDescender;

 05021                isMaxVisibleDescenderSet = true;
 5022

 05035            m_textInfo.lineInfo[m_lineNumber].width = width;
 5036
 05037            float glyphAdjustment = m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_lastVisibleCharacterOfLine].adjustedHorizontalAdvance;
 05038            float maxAdvanceOffset = (glyphAdjustment * currentElementScale + (m_currentFontAsset.normalSpacingOffset + 
 05039            float adjustedHorizontalAdvance = m_textInfo.lineInfo[m_lineNumber].maxAdvance = m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_
 05040            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_lastVisibleCharacterOfLine].xAdvance = adjustedHorizontalAdvance;
 5041
 05042            m_textInfo.lineInfo[m_lineNumber].baseline = 0 - m_lineOffset;
 05043            m_textInfo.lineInfo[m_lineNumber].ascender = lineAscender;
 05044            m_textInfo.lineInfo[m_lineNumber].descender = lineDescender;

 5046

 05049            m_lineVisibleSpaceCount = 0;
 5050
 5051            // Store the state of the line before starting on the new line.

 5053
 05054            m_lineNumber += 1;
 5055
 5056            // Check to make sure Array is large enough to hold a new line.
 05057            if (m_lineNumber >= m_textInfo.lineInfo.Length)
 05058                ResizeLineExtents(m_lineNumber);
 5059

 05061            if (m_lineHeight == TMP_Math.FLOAT_UNSET)

 05064                float lineOffsetDelta = 0 - m_maxLineDescender + ascender + (lineGap + m_lineSpacingDelta) * baseScale +
 05065                m_lineOffset += lineOffsetDelta;

 05068            }
 5069            else
 05070            {

 05072            }
 5073
 05074            m_maxLineAscender = k_LargeNegativeFloat;
 05075            m_maxLineDescender = k_LargePositiveFloat;
 5076
 05077            m_xAdvance = 0 + tag_Indent;
 05078            k_InsertNewLineMarker.End();
 05079        }

 5178        /// <summary>
 5179        /// Restore the State of various variables used in the mesh creation loop.
 5180        /// </summary>

 5182        /// <returns></returns>
 5183        internal int RestoreWordWrappingState(ref WordWrapState state)
 05184        {
 05185            int index = state.previous_WordBreak;
 5186
 5187            // Multi Font & Material support related
 05188            m_currentFontAsset = state.currentFontAsset;
 05189            m_currentSpriteAsset = state.currentSpriteAsset;
 05190            m_currentMaterial = state.currentMaterial;
 05191            m_currentMaterialIndex = state.currentMaterialIndex;
 5192
 05193            m_characterCount = state.total_CharacterCount + 1;
 05194            m_lineVisibleCharacterCount = state.visible_CharacterCount;
 05195            m_lineVisibleSpaceCount = state.visibleSpaceCount;
 5196            //m_visibleCharacterCount = state.visible_CharacterCount;
 5197            //m_visibleSpriteCount = state.visible_SpriteCount;
 05198            m_textInfo.linkCount = state.visible_LinkCount;
 5199
 05200            m_firstCharacterOfLine = state.firstCharacterIndex;

 05202            m_lastVisibleCharacterOfLine = state.lastVisibleCharIndex;
 5203
 05204            m_FontStyleInternal = state.fontStyle;

 05209            m_xAdvance = state.xAdvance;

 05216            m_PageAscender = state.pageAscender;
 5217
 05218            m_preferredWidth = state.preferredWidth;
 05219            m_preferredHeight = state.preferredHeight;
 05220            m_RenderedWidth = state.renderedWidth;
 05221            m_RenderedHeight = state.renderedHeight;

 5223
 05224            m_lineNumber = state.lineNumber;
 05225            m_lineOffset = state.lineOffset;
 05226            m_baselineOffset = state.baselineOffset;
 05227            m_IsDrivenLineSpacing = state.isDrivenLineSpacing;
 05228            m_LastBaseGlyphIndex = state.lastBaseGlyphIndex;
 5229
 05230            m_cSpacing = state.cSpace;
 05231            m_monoSpacing = state.mSpace;
 5232
 05233            m_lineJustification = state.horizontalAlignment;
 05234            m_marginLeft = state.marginLeft;
 05235            m_marginRight = state.marginRight;
 5236
 05237            m_htmlColor = state.vertexColor;
 05238            m_underlineColor = state.underlineColor;
 05239            m_strikethroughColor = state.strikethroughColor;
 05240            m_HighlightState = state.highlightState;
 5241
 05242            m_isNonBreakingSpace = state.isNonBreakingSpace;
 05243            tag_NoParsing = state.tagNoParsing;
 5244
 05245            m_FXRotation = state.fxRotation;
 05246            m_FXScale = state.fxScale;
 5247
 5248            // XML Tag Stack
 05249            m_fontStyleStack = state.basicStyleStack;
 05250            m_ItalicAngleStack = state.italicAngleStack;
 05251            m_colorStack = state.colorStack;
 05252            m_underlineColorStack = state.underlineColorStack;
 05253            m_strikethroughColorStack = state.strikethroughColorStack;
 05254            m_HighlightStateStack = state.highlightStateStack;
 05255            m_colorGradientStack = state.colorGradientStack;
 05256            m_sizeStack = state.sizeStack;
 05257            m_indentStack = state.indentStack;
 05258            m_FontWeightStack = state.fontWeightStack;
 5259            //m_styleStack = state.styleStack;
 5260
 05261            m_baselineOffsetStack = state.baselineStack;
 05262            m_actionStack = state.actionStack;
 05263            m_materialReferenceStack = state.materialReferenceStack;
 05264            m_lineJustificationStack = state.lineJustificationStack;
 5265            //m_spriteAnimationStack = state.spriteAnimationStack;
 5266
 05267            m_spriteAnimationID = state.spriteAnimationID;
 5268
 05269            if (m_lineNumber < m_textInfo.lineInfo.Length)
 05270                m_textInfo.lineInfo[m_lineNumber] = state.lineInfo;
 5271
 05272            return index;
 05273        }

 5276        /// <summary>
 5277        /// Store vertex information for each character.
 5278        /// </summary>
 5279        /// <param name="style_padding">Style_padding.</param>
 5280        /// <param name="vertexColor">Vertex color.</param>
 5281        protected virtual void SaveGlyphVertexInfo(float padding, float style_padding, Color32 vertexColor)
 4245282        {
 5283            // Save the Vertex Position for the Character
 5284            #region Setup Mesh Vertices
 4245285            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BL.position = m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].b
 4245286            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TL.position = m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].t
 4245287            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TR.position = m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].t
 4245288            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BR.position = m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].b
 5289            #endregion
 5290
 5291
 5292            #region Setup Vertex Colors
 5293            // Alpha is the lower of the vertex color or tag color alpha used.
 4245294            vertexColor.a = m_fontColor32.a < vertexColor.a ? m_fontColor32.a : vertexColor.a;
 5295
 5296            #if TEXTCORE_FONT_ENGINE_1_5_OR_NEWER
 4245297            bool isColorGlyph = ((GlyphRasterModes)m_currentFontAsset.m_AtlasRenderMode & GlyphRasterModes.RASTER_MODE_C
 5298            #else
 5299            bool isColorGlyph = false;
 5300            #endif
 5301
 5302            // Handle Vertex Colors & Vertex Color Gradient
 4245303            if (!m_enableVertexGradient || isColorGlyph)
 4245304            {
 5305                // Special handling for color glyphs
 4245306                vertexColor = isColorGlyph ? new Color32(255, 255, 255, vertexColor.a) : vertexColor;
 5307
 4245308                m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BL.color = vertexColor;
 4245309                m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TL.color = vertexColor;
 4245310                m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TR.color = vertexColor;
 4245311                m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BR.color = vertexColor;
 4245312            }
 5313            else
 05314            {
 05315                if (!m_overrideHtmlColors && m_colorStack.index > 1)
 05316                {
 05317                    m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BL.color = vertexColor;
 05318                    m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TL.color = vertexColor;
 05319                    m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TR.color = vertexColor;
 05320                    m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BR.color = vertexColor;
 05321                }
 5322                else // Handle Vertex Color Gradient
 05323                {
 5324                    // Use Vertex Color Gradient Preset (if one is assigned)
 05325                    if (m_fontColorGradientPreset != null)
 05326                    {
 05327                        m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BL.color = m_fontColorGradientPreset.bottomLef
 05328                        m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TL.color = m_fontColorGradientPreset.topLeft *
 05329                        m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TR.color = m_fontColorGradientPreset.topRight 
 05330                        m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BR.color = m_fontColorGradientPreset.bottomRig
 05331                    }
 5332                    else
 05333                    {
 05334                        m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BL.color = m_fontColorGradient.bottomLeft * ve
 05335                        m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TL.color = m_fontColorGradient.topLeft * verte
 05336                        m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TR.color = m_fontColorGradient.topRight * vert
 05337                        m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BR.color = m_fontColorGradient.bottomRight * v
 05338                    }
 05339                }
 05340            }
 5341
 4245342            if (m_colorGradientPreset != null && !isColorGlyph)
 05343            {
 05344                if (m_colorGradientPresetIsTinted)
 05345                {
 05346                    m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BL.color *= m_colorGradientPreset.bottomLeft;
 05347                    m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TL.color *= m_colorGradientPreset.topLeft;
 05348                    m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TR.color *= m_colorGradientPreset.topRight;
 05349                    m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BR.color *= m_colorGradientPreset.bottomRight;
 05350                }
 5351                else
 05352                {
 05353                    m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BL.color = m_colorGradientPreset.bottomLeft.MinAlp
 05354                    m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TL.color = m_colorGradientPreset.topLeft.MinAlpha(
 05355                    m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TR.color = m_colorGradientPreset.topRight.MinAlpha
 05356                    m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BR.color = m_colorGradientPreset.bottomRight.MinAl
 05357                }
 05358            }
 5359            #endregion
 5360
 5361            // Apply style_padding only if this is a SDF Shader.
 4245362            if (!m_isSDFShader)
 05363                style_padding = 0f;
 5364
 5365
 5366            // Setup UVs for the Character
 5367            #region Setup UVs
 5368
 4245369            Glyph altGlyph = m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].alternativeGlyph;
 4245370            GlyphRect glyphRect = altGlyph == null ? m_cached_TextElement.m_Glyph.glyphRect : altGlyph.glyphRect;
 5371
 5372            Vector2 uv0;
 4245373            uv0.x = (glyphRect.x - padding - style_padding) / m_currentFontAsset.m_AtlasWidth;
 4245374            uv0.y = (glyphRect.y - padding - style_padding) / m_currentFontAsset.m_AtlasHeight;
 5375
 5376            Vector2 uv1;
 4245377            uv1.x = uv0.x;
 4245378            uv1.y = (glyphRect.y + padding + style_padding + glyphRect.height) / m_currentFontAsset.m_AtlasHeight;
 5379
 5380            Vector2 uv2;
 4245381            uv2.x = (glyphRect.x + padding + style_padding + glyphRect.width) / m_currentFontAsset.m_AtlasWidth;
 4245382            uv2.y = uv1.y;
 5383
 5384            Vector2 uv3;
 4245385            uv3.x = uv2.x;
 4245386            uv3.y = uv0.y;
 5387
 5388            // Store UV Information
 4245389            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BL.uv = uv0;
 4245390            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TL.uv = uv1;
 4245391            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TR.uv = uv2;
 4245392            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BR.uv = uv3;
 5393            #endregion Setup UVs
 5394
 5395
 5396            // Normal
 5397            #region Setup Normals & Tangents
 5398            //Vector3 normal = new Vector3(0, 0, -1);
 5399            //m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BL.normal = normal;
 5400            //m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TL.normal = normal;
 5401            //m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TR.normal = normal;
 5402            //m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BR.normal = normal;
 5403
 5404            // Tangents
 5405            //Vector4 tangent = new Vector4(-1, 0, 0, 1);
 5406            //m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BL.tangent = tangent;
 5407            //m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TL.tangent = tangent;
 5408            //m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TR.tangent = tangent;
 5409            //m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BR.tangent = tangent;
 5410            #endregion end Normals & Tangents
 4245411        }

 5414        /// <summary>
 5415        /// Store vertex information for each sprite.
 5416        /// </summary>
 5417        /// <param name="padding"></param>
 5418        /// <param name="style_padding"></param>
 5419        /// <param name="vertexColor"></param>
 5420        protected virtual void SaveSpriteVertexInfo(Color32 vertexColor)
 05421        {
 5422            // Save the Vertex Position for the Character
 5423            #region Setup Mesh Vertices
 05424            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BL.position = m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].b
 05425            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TL.position = m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].t
 05426            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TR.position = m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].t
 05427            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BR.position = m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].b
 5428            #endregion
 5429
 5430            // Vertex Color Alpha
 05431            if (m_tintAllSprites) m_tintSprite = true;
 05432            Color32 spriteColor = m_tintSprite ? m_spriteColor.Multiply(vertexColor) : m_spriteColor;
 05433            spriteColor.a = spriteColor.a < m_fontColor32.a ? spriteColor.a < vertexColor.a ? spriteColor.a : vertexColo
 5434
 05435            Color32 c0 = spriteColor;
 05436            Color32 c1 = spriteColor;
 05437            Color32 c2 = spriteColor;
 05438            Color32 c3 = spriteColor;
 5439
 05440            if (m_enableVertexGradient)
 05441            {
 05442                if (m_fontColorGradientPreset != null)
 05443                {
 05444                    c0 = m_tintSprite ? c0.Multiply(m_fontColorGradientPreset.bottomLeft) : c0;
 05445                    c1 = m_tintSprite ? c1.Multiply(m_fontColorGradientPreset.topLeft) : c1;
 05446                    c2 = m_tintSprite ? c2.Multiply(m_fontColorGradientPreset.topRight) : c2;
 05447                    c3 = m_tintSprite ? c3.Multiply(m_fontColorGradientPreset.bottomRight) : c3;
 05448                }
 5449                else
 05450                {
 05451                    c0 = m_tintSprite ? c0.Multiply(m_fontColorGradient.bottomLeft) : c0;
 05452                    c1 = m_tintSprite ? c1.Multiply(m_fontColorGradient.topLeft) : c1;
 05453                    c2 = m_tintSprite ? c2.Multiply(m_fontColorGradient.topRight) : c2;
 05454                    c3 = m_tintSprite ? c3.Multiply(m_fontColorGradient.bottomRight) : c3;
 05455                }
 05456            }
 5457
 05458            if (m_colorGradientPreset != null)
 05459            {
 05460                c0 = m_tintSprite ? c0.Multiply(m_colorGradientPreset.bottomLeft) : c0;
 05461                c1 = m_tintSprite ? c1.Multiply(m_colorGradientPreset.topLeft) : c1;
 05462                c2 = m_tintSprite ? c2.Multiply(m_colorGradientPreset.topRight) : c2;
 05463                c3 = m_tintSprite ? c3.Multiply(m_colorGradientPreset.bottomRight) : c3;
 05464            }
 5465
 05466            m_tintSprite = false;
 5467
 05468            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BL.color = c0;
 05469            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TL.color = c1;
 05470            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TR.color = c2;
 05471            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BR.color = c3;
 5472
 5473
 5474            // Setup UVs for the Character
 5475            #region Setup UVs
 05476            GlyphRect glyphRect = m_cached_TextElement.m_Glyph.glyphRect;
 5477
 05478            Vector2 uv0 = new Vector2((float)glyphRect.x / m_currentSpriteAsset.spriteSheet.width, (float)glyphRect.y / 
 05479            Vector2 uv1 = new Vector2(uv0.x, (float)(glyphRect.y + glyphRect.height) / m_currentSpriteAsset.spriteSheet.
 05480            Vector2 uv2 = new Vector2((float)(glyphRect.x + glyphRect.width) / m_currentSpriteAsset.spriteSheet.width, u
 05481            Vector2 uv3 = new Vector2(uv2.x, uv0.y); // bottom right
 5482
 5483            // Store UV Information
 05484            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BL.uv = uv0;
 05485            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TL.uv = uv1;
 05486            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TR.uv = uv2;
 05487            m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_BR.uv = uv3;
 5488            #endregion Setup UVs
 5489
 5490
 5491            // Normal

 5502            //m_textInfo.characterInfo[m_characterCount].vertex_TL.tangent = tangent;

 05507        }

 5510        /// <summary>
 5511        /// Store vertex attributes into the appropriate TMP_MeshInfo.
 5512        /// </summary>
 5513        /// <param name="i"></param>
 5514        /// <param name="index_X4"></param>
 5515        protected virtual void FillCharacterVertexBuffers(int i)
 4245516        {
 4245517            int materialIndex = m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].materialReferenceIndex;
 4245518            int index_X4 = m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertexCount;
 5519
 5520            // Check to make sure our current mesh buffer allocations can hold these new Quads.
 4245521            if (index_X4 >= m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertices.Length)
 05522                m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].ResizeMeshInfo(Mathf.NextPowerOfTwo((index_X4 + 4) / 4));
 5523
 5524
 4245525            TMP_CharacterInfo[] characterInfoArray = m_textInfo.characterInfo;
 4245526            m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].vertexIndex = index_X4;
 5527
 5528            // Setup Vertices for Characters
 4245529            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertices[0 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BL.position;
 4245530            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertices[1 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TL.position;
 4245531            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertices[2 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR.position;
 4245532            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertices[3 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR.position;
 5533
 5534
 5535            // Setup UVS0
 4245536            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs0[0 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BL.uv;
 4245537            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs0[1 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TL.uv;
 4245538            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs0[2 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR.uv;
 4245539            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs0[3 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR.uv;
 5540
 5541
 5542            // Setup UVS2
 4245543            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs2[0 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BL.uv2;
 4245544            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs2[1 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TL.uv2;
 4245545            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs2[2 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR.uv2;
 4245546            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs2[3 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR.uv2;
 5547
 5548
 5549            // Setup UVS4
 5550            //m_textInfo.meshInfo[0].uvs4[0 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BL.uv4;
 5551            //m_textInfo.meshInfo[0].uvs4[1 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TL.uv4;
 5552            //m_textInfo.meshInfo[0].uvs4[2 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR.uv4;
 5553            //m_textInfo.meshInfo[0].uvs4[3 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR.uv4;
 5554
 5555
 5556            // setup Vertex Colors
 4245557            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].colors32[0 + index_X4] = m_ConvertToLinearSpace ? characterInfoArray[i].v
 4245558            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].colors32[1 + index_X4] = m_ConvertToLinearSpace ? characterInfoArray[i].v
 4245559            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].colors32[2 + index_X4] = m_ConvertToLinearSpace ? characterInfoArray[i].v
 4245560            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].colors32[3 + index_X4] = m_ConvertToLinearSpace ? characterInfoArray[i].v
 5561
 4245562            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertexCount = index_X4 + 4;
 4245563        }

 05567        {

 5570
 5571            // Check to make sure our current mesh buffer allocations can hold these new Quads.
 05572            if (index_X4 >= m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertices.Length)
 05573                m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].ResizeMeshInfo(Mathf.NextPowerOfTwo((index_X4 + (isVolumetric ? 8 : 4

 05581            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertices[2 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR.position;
 05582            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertices[3 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR.position;
 5583
 5584            // if (isVolumetric)
 5585            // {
 5586            //     Vector3 depth = new Vector3(0, 0, m_fontSize * m_fontScale);
 5587            //     m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertices[4 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BL.position 
 5588            //     m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertices[5 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TL.position 
 5589            //     m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertices[6 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR.position 
 5590            //     m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertices[7 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR.position 
 5591            // }
 5592
 5593            // Setup UVS0
 05594            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs0[0 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BL.uv;
 05595            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs0[1 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TL.uv;
 05596            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs0[2 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR.uv;
 05597            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs0[3 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR.uv;
 5598
 05599            if (isVolumetric)
 05600            {
 05601                m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs0[4 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BL.uv;
 05602                m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs0[5 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TL.uv;
 05603                m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs0[6 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR.uv;
 05604                m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs0[7 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR.uv;
 05605            }
 5606
 5607
 5608            // Setup UVS2
 05609            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs2[0 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BL.uv2;
 05610            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs2[1 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TL.uv2;
 05611            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs2[2 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR.uv2;
 05612            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs2[3 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR.uv2;
 5613
 05614            if (isVolumetric)
 05615            {
 05616                m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs2[4 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BL.uv2;
 05617                m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs2[5 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TL.uv2;
 05618                m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs2[6 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR.uv2;
 05619                m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs2[7 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR.uv2;
 05620            }
 5621
 5622
 5623            // Setup UVS4
 5624            //m_textInfo.meshInfo[0].uvs4[0 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BL.uv4;
 5625            //m_textInfo.meshInfo[0].uvs4[1 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TL.uv4;
 5626            //m_textInfo.meshInfo[0].uvs4[2 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR.uv4;
 5627            //m_textInfo.meshInfo[0].uvs4[3 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR.uv4;
 5628
 5629
 5630            // setup Vertex Colors
 05631            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].colors32[0 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BL.color;
 05632            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].colors32[1 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TL.color;
 05633            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].colors32[2 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR.color;
 05634            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].colors32[3 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR.color;
 5635
 05636            if (isVolumetric)
 05637            {
 05638                Color32 backColor = new Color32(255, 255, 128, 255);
 05639                m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].colors32[4 + index_X4] = backColor; //characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BL
 05640                m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].colors32[5 + index_X4] = backColor; //characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TL
 05641                m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].colors32[6 + index_X4] = backColor; //characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR
 05642                m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].colors32[7 + index_X4] = backColor; //characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR
 05643            }
 5644
 05645            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertexCount = index_X4 + (!isVolumetric ? 4 : 8);
 05646        }
 5647
 5648
 5649        /// <summary>
 5650        /// Fill Vertex Buffers for Sprites
 5651        /// </summary>
 5652        /// <param name="i"></param>
 5653        /// <param name="spriteIndex_X4"></param>
 5654        protected virtual void FillSpriteVertexBuffers(int i)
 05655        {

 5658
 5659            // Check to make sure our current mesh buffer allocations can hold these new Quads.
 05660            if (index_X4 >= m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertices.Length)

 05669            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertices[2 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR.position;
 05670            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertices[3 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR.position;
 5671
 5672
 5673            // Setup UVS0
 05674            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs0[0 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BL.uv;
 05675            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs0[1 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TL.uv;
 05676            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs0[2 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR.uv;
 05677            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs0[3 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR.uv;
 5678
 5679
 5680            // Setup UVS2
 05681            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs2[0 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BL.uv2;
 05682            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs2[1 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TL.uv2;
 05683            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs2[2 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR.uv2;
 05684            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].uvs2[3 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR.uv2;
 5685
 5686
 5687            // Setup UVS4
 5688            //m_textInfo.meshInfo[0].uvs4[0 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BL.uv4;
 5689            //m_textInfo.meshInfo[0].uvs4[1 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TL.uv4;
 5690            //m_textInfo.meshInfo[0].uvs4[2 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_TR.uv4;
 5691            //m_textInfo.meshInfo[0].uvs4[3 + index_X4] = characterInfoArray[i].vertex_BR.uv4;
 5692
 5693
 5694            // setup Vertex Colors

 05696            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].colors32[1 + index_X4] = m_ConvertToLinearSpace ? characterInfoArray[i].v

 05698            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].colors32[3 + index_X4] = m_ConvertToLinearSpace ? characterInfoArray[i].v
 5699
 05700            m_textInfo.meshInfo[materialIndex].vertexCount = index_X4 + 4;

 5702
 5703
 5704        /// <summary>
 5705        /// Method to add the underline geometry.
 5706        /// </summary>
 5707        /// <param name="start"></param>
 5708        /// <param name="end"></param>
 5709        /// <param name="startScale"></param>
 5710        /// <param name="endScale"></param>
 5711        /// <param name="maxScale"></param>
 5712        /// <param name="underlineColor"></param>
 5713        protected virtual void DrawUnderlineMesh(Vector3 start, Vector3 end, ref int index, float startScale, float endS
 05714        {
 5715            // Get Underline special character from the primary font asset.
 05716            GetUnderlineSpecialCharacter(m_fontAsset);
 5717
 05718            if (m_Underline.character == null)
 05719            {
 05720                if (!TMP_Settings.warningsDisabled)
 05721                    Debug.LogWarning("Unable to add underline or strikethrough since the character [0x5F] used by these 
 5722
 05723                return;
 5724            }
 5725
 05726            int underlineMaterialIndex = m_Underline.materialIndex;
 5727
 05728            int verticesCount = index + 12;
 5729
 5730            // Check to make sure our current mesh buffer allocations can hold these new Quads.
 05731            if (verticesCount > m_textInfo.meshInfo[underlineMaterialIndex].vertices.Length)
 05732            {
 5733                // Resize Mesh Buffers
 05734                m_textInfo.meshInfo[underlineMaterialIndex].ResizeMeshInfo(verticesCount / 4);
 05735            }
 5736
 5737            // Adjust the position of the underline based on the lowest character. This matters for subscript character.
 05738            start.y = Mathf.Min(start.y, end.y);
 05739            end.y = Mathf.Min(start.y, end.y);
 5740
 05741            GlyphMetrics underlineGlyphMetrics = m_Underline.character.glyph.metrics;
 05742            GlyphRect underlineGlyphRect = m_Underline.character.glyph.glyphRect;
 5743
 05744            float segmentWidth = underlineGlyphMetrics.width / 2 * maxScale;
 5745
 05746            if (end.x - start.x < underlineGlyphMetrics.width * maxScale)
 05747            {
 05748                segmentWidth = (end.x - start.x) / 2f;
 05749            }
 5750
 05751            float startPadding = m_padding * startScale / maxScale;
 05752            float endPadding = m_padding * endScale / maxScale;
 5753
 05754            float underlineThickness = m_Underline.fontAsset.faceInfo.underlineThickness;
 5755
 5756            // UNDERLINE VERTICES FOR (3) LINE SEGMENTS
 5757            #region UNDERLINE VERTICES
 05758            Vector3[] vertices = m_textInfo.meshInfo[underlineMaterialIndex].vertices;
 5759
 5760            // Front Part of the Underline
 05761            vertices[index + 0] = start + new Vector3(0, 0 - (underlineThickness + m_padding) * maxScale, 0); // BL
 05762            vertices[index + 1] = start + new Vector3(0, m_padding * maxScale, 0); // TL
 05763            vertices[index + 2] = vertices[index + 1] + new Vector3(segmentWidth, 0, 0); // TR
 05764            vertices[index + 3] = vertices[index + 0] + new Vector3(segmentWidth, 0, 0); // BR
 5765
 5766            // Middle Part of the Underline
 05767            vertices[index + 4] = vertices[index + 3]; // BL
 05768            vertices[index + 5] = vertices[index + 2]; // TL
 05769            vertices[index + 6] = end + new Vector3(-segmentWidth, m_padding * maxScale, 0);  // TR
 05770            vertices[index + 7] = end + new Vector3(-segmentWidth, -(underlineThickness + m_padding) * maxScale, 0); // 
 5771
 5772            // End Part of the Underline
 05773            vertices[index + 8] = vertices[index + 7]; // BL
 05774            vertices[index + 9] = vertices[index + 6]; // TL
 05775            vertices[index + 10] = end + new Vector3(0, m_padding * maxScale, 0); // TR
 05776            vertices[index + 11] = end + new Vector3(0, -(underlineThickness + m_padding) * maxScale, 0); // BR
 5777            #endregion
 5778
 5779            // UNDERLINE UV0
 5780            #region HANDLE UV0
 05781            Vector4[] uvs0 = m_textInfo.meshInfo[underlineMaterialIndex].uvs0;
 5782
 05783            int atlasWidth = m_Underline.fontAsset.atlasWidth;
 05784            int atlasHeight = m_Underline.fontAsset.atlasHeight;
 5785
 05786            float xScale = Mathf.Abs(sdfScale);
 5787
 5788            // Calculate UV required to setup the 3 Quads for the Underline.
 05789            Vector4 uv0 = new Vector4((underlineGlyphRect.x - startPadding) / atlasWidth, (underlineGlyphRect.y - m_padd
 05790            Vector4 uv1 = new Vector4(uv0.x, (underlineGlyphRect.y + underlineGlyphRect.height + m_padding) / atlasHeigh
 05791            Vector4 uv2 = new Vector4((underlineGlyphRect.x - startPadding + (float)underlineGlyphRect.width / 2) / atla
 05792            Vector4 uv3 = new Vector4(uv2.x, uv0.y, 0, xScale); // Mid Bottom Left
 05793            Vector4 uv4 = new Vector4((underlineGlyphRect.x + endPadding + (float)underlineGlyphRect.width / 2) / atlasW
 05794            Vector4 uv5 = new Vector4(uv4.x, uv0.y, 0, xScale); // Mid Bottom right
 05795            Vector4 uv6 = new Vector4((underlineGlyphRect.x + endPadding + underlineGlyphRect.width) / atlasWidth, uv1.y
 05796            Vector4 uv7 = new Vector4(uv6.x, uv0.y, 0, xScale); // End Part - Top Right
 5797
 5798            // Left Part of the Underline
 05799            uvs0[0 + index] = uv0; // BL
 05800            uvs0[1 + index] = uv1; // TL
 05801            uvs0[2 + index] = uv2; // TR
 05802            uvs0[3 + index] = uv3; // BR
 5803
 5804            // Middle Part of the Underline
 05805            uvs0[4 + index] = new Vector4(uv2.x - uv2.x * 0.001f, uv0.y, 0, xScale);
 05806            uvs0[5 + index] = new Vector4(uv2.x - uv2.x * 0.001f, uv1.y, 0, xScale);
 05807            uvs0[6 + index] = new Vector4(uv2.x + uv2.x * 0.001f, uv1.y, 0, xScale);
 05808            uvs0[7 + index] = new Vector4(uv2.x + uv2.x * 0.001f, uv0.y, 0, xScale);
 5809
 5810            // Right Part of the Underline
 05811            uvs0[8 + index] = uv5;
 05812            uvs0[9 + index] = uv4;
 05813            uvs0[10 + index] = uv6;
 05814            uvs0[11 + index] = uv7;
 5815            #endregion
 5816
 5817            // UNDERLINE UV2
 5818            #region HANDLE UV2 - SDF SCALE
 5819            // UV1 contains Face / Border UV layout.
 05820            float min_UvX = 0;
 05821            float max_UvX = (vertices[index + 2].x - start.x) / (end.x - start.x);
 5822
 05823            Vector2[] uvs2 = m_textInfo.meshInfo[underlineMaterialIndex].uvs2;
 5824
 05825            uvs2[0 + index] = new Vector2 (0, 0);
 05826            uvs2[1 + index] = new Vector2(0, 1);
 05827            uvs2[2 + index] = new Vector2(max_UvX, 1);
 05828            uvs2[3 + index] = new Vector2(max_UvX, 0);
 5829
 05830            min_UvX = (vertices[index + 4].x - start.x) / (end.x - start.x);
 05831            max_UvX = (vertices[index + 6].x - start.x) / (end.x - start.x);
 5832
 05833            uvs2[4 + index] = new Vector2(min_UvX, 0);
 05834            uvs2[5 + index] = new Vector2(min_UvX, 1);
 05835            uvs2[6 + index] = new Vector2(max_UvX, 1);
 05836            uvs2[7 + index] = new Vector2(max_UvX, 0);
 5837
 05838            min_UvX = (vertices[index + 8].x - start.x) / (end.x - start.x);
 5839
 05840            uvs2[8 + index] = new Vector2(min_UvX, 0);
 05841            uvs2[9 + index] = new Vector2(min_UvX, 1);
 05842            uvs2[10 + index] = new Vector2(1, 1);
 05843            uvs2[11 + index] = new Vector2(1, 0);
 5844            #endregion
 5845
 5846            // UNDERLINE VERTEX COLORS
 5847            #region UNDERLINE VERTEX COLORS
 5848            // Alpha is the lower of the vertex color or tag color alpha used.
 05849            underlineColor.a = m_fontColor32.a < underlineColor.a ? m_fontColor32.a : underlineColor.a;
 5850
 05851            Color32[] colors32 = m_textInfo.meshInfo[underlineMaterialIndex].colors32;

 5872        protected virtual void DrawTextHighlight(Vector3 start, Vector3 end, ref int index, Color32 highlightColor)

 05875            {

 5884                }
 05885            }

 5888
 05889            int verticesCount = index + 4;
 5890
 5891            // Check to make sure our current mesh buffer allocations can hold these new Quads.
 05892            if (verticesCount > m_textInfo.meshInfo[underlineMaterialIndex].vertices.Length)
 05893            {
 5894                // Resize Mesh Buffers
 05895                m_textInfo.meshInfo[underlineMaterialIndex].ResizeMeshInfo(verticesCount / 4);
 05896            }
 5897
 5898            // UNDERLINE VERTICES FOR (3) LINE SEGMENTS
 5899            #region HIGHLIGHT VERTICES
 05900            Vector3[] vertices = m_textInfo.meshInfo[underlineMaterialIndex].vertices;
 5901
 5902            // Front Part of the Underline
 05903            vertices[index + 0] = start; // BL
 05904            vertices[index + 1] = new Vector3(start.x, end.y, 0); // TL
 05905            vertices[index + 2] = end; // TR
 05906            vertices[index + 3] = new Vector3(end.x, start.y, 0); // BR
 5907            #endregion
 5908
 5909            // UNDERLINE UV0
 5910            #region HANDLE UV0
 05911            Vector4[] uvs0 = m_textInfo.meshInfo[underlineMaterialIndex].uvs0;
 5912
 05913            int atlasWidth = m_Underline.fontAsset.atlasWidth;
 05914            int atlasHeight = m_Underline.fontAsset.atlasHeight;
 05915            GlyphRect glyphRect = m_Underline.character.glyph.glyphRect;
 5916
 5917            // Calculate UV
 05918            Vector2 uvGlyphCenter = new Vector2((glyphRect.x + (float)glyphRect.width / 2) / atlasWidth, (glyphRect.y + 
 05919            Vector2 uvTexelSize = new Vector2(1.0f / atlasWidth, 1.0f / atlasHeight);
 5920
 5921            // UVs for the Quad
 05922            uvs0[index + 0] = uvGlyphCenter - uvTexelSize; // BL
 05923            uvs0[index + 1] = uvGlyphCenter + new Vector2(-uvTexelSize.x, uvTexelSize.y); // TL
 05924            uvs0[index + 2] = uvGlyphCenter + uvTexelSize; // TR
 05925            uvs0[index + 3] = uvGlyphCenter + new Vector2(uvTexelSize.x, -uvTexelSize.y); // BR
 5926            #endregion
 5927
 5928            // HIGHLIGHT UV2
 5929            #region HANDLE UV2 - SDF SCALE
 05930            Vector2[] uvs2 = m_textInfo.meshInfo[underlineMaterialIndex].uvs2;
 05931            Vector2 customUV = new Vector2(0, 1);
 05932            uvs2[index + 0] = customUV;
 05933            uvs2[index + 1] = customUV;
 05934            uvs2[index + 2] = customUV;
 05935            uvs2[index + 3] = customUV;
 5936            #endregion
 5937
 5938            // HIGHLIGHT VERTEX COLORS
 5939            #region HIGHLIGHT VERTEX COLORS
 5940            // Alpha is the lower of the vertex color or tag color alpha used.
 05941            highlightColor.a = m_fontColor32.a < highlightColor.a ? m_fontColor32.a : highlightColor.a;
 5942
 05943            Color32[] colors32 = m_textInfo.meshInfo[underlineMaterialIndex].colors32;
 05944            colors32[index + 0] = highlightColor;
 05945            colors32[index + 1] = highlightColor;
 05946            colors32[index + 2] = highlightColor;
 05947            colors32[index + 3] = highlightColor;
 5948            #endregion
 5949
 05950            index += 4;
 05951        }

 6292        /// <summary>
 6293        /// Function which returns the text after it has been parsed and rich text tags removed.
 6294        /// </summary>
 6295        /// <returns></returns>
 6296        public virtual string GetParsedText()
 06297        {
 06298            if (m_textInfo == null)
 06299                return string.Empty;
 6300
 06301            int characterCount = m_textInfo.characterCount;
 6302
 6303            // TODO - Could implement some static buffer pool shared by all instances of TMP objects.
 06304            char[] buffer = new char[characterCount];
 6305
 06306            for (int i = 0; i < characterCount && i < m_textInfo.characterInfo.Length; i++)
 06307            {
 06308                buffer[i] = m_textInfo.characterInfo[i].character;
 06309            }
 6310
 06311            return new string(buffer);
 06312        }

 6315        internal bool IsSelfOrLinkedAncestor(TMP_Text targetTextComponent)
 06316        {
 06317            if (targetTextComponent == null)
 06318                return true;
 6319
 06320            if (parentLinkedComponent != null)
 06321            {
 06322                if (parentLinkedComponent.IsSelfOrLinkedAncestor(targetTextComponent))
 06323                    return true;
 06324            }
 6325
 06326            if (this.GetInstanceID() == targetTextComponent.GetInstanceID())
 06327                return true;
 6328
 06329            return false;
 06330        }
 6331
 6332        internal void ReleaseLinkedTextComponent(TMP_Text targetTextComponent)
 06333        {
 06334            if (targetTextComponent == null)
 06335                return;
 6336
 06337            TMP_Text childLinkedComponent = targetTextComponent.linkedTextComponent;
 6338
 06339            if (childLinkedComponent != null)
 06340                ReleaseLinkedTextComponent(childLinkedComponent);
 6341
 06342            targetTextComponent.text = string.Empty;
 06343            targetTextComponent.firstVisibleCharacter = 0;
 06344            targetTextComponent.linkedTextComponent = null;
 06345            targetTextComponent.parentLinkedComponent = null;
 06346        }

 6375        /// <summary>
 6376        /// Function to pack scale information in the UV2 Channel.
 6377        /// </summary>
 6378        /// <param name="x"></param>
 6379        /// <param name="y"></param>
 6380        /// <param name="scale"></param>
 6381        /// <returns></returns>
 6382        protected Vector2 PackUV(float x, float y, float scale)
 06383        {
 6384            Vector2 output;
 6385
 06386            output.x = (int)(x * 511);
 06387            output.y = (int)(y * 511);
 6388
 06389            output.x = (output.x * 4096) + output.y;
 06390            output.y = scale;
 6391
 06392            return output;
 06393        }

 6396        /// <summary>
 6397        ///
 6398        /// </summary>

 6401        /// <returns></returns>

 06403        {

 06405            double y0 = (int)(y * 511);
 6406
 06407            return (float)((x0 * 4096) + y0);
 06408        }

 6450        /// <summary>
 6451        /// Method to convert Hex to Int
 6452        /// </summary>
 6453        /// <param name="hex"></param>
 6454        /// <returns></returns>
 6455        protected uint HexToInt(char hex)
 06456        {
 06457            switch (hex)
 6458            {
 06459                case '0': return 0;
 06460                case '1': return 1;
 06461                case '2': return 2;
 06462                case '3': return 3;
 06463                case '4': return 4;
 06464                case '5': return 5;
 06465                case '6': return 6;
 06466                case '7': return 7;
 06467                case '8': return 8;
 06468                case '9': return 9;
 06469                case 'A': return 10;
 06470                case 'B': return 11;
 06471                case 'C': return 12;
 06472                case 'D': return 13;
 06473                case 'E': return 14;
 06474                case 'F': return 15;
 06475                case 'a': return 10;
 06476                case 'b': return 11;
 06477                case 'c': return 12;
 06478                case 'd': return 13;
 06479                case 'e': return 14;
 06480                case 'f': return 15;
 6481            }
 06482            return 15;
 06483        }
 6484
 6485        bool IsValidUTF16(TextBackingContainer text, int index)
 06486        {
 06487            for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
 06488            {
 06489                uint c = text[index + i];
 06490                if (!(c >= '0' && c <= '9' || c >= 'a' && c <= 'f' || c >= 'A' && c <= 'F'))
 06491                    return false;
 06492            }
 6493
 06494            return true;
 06495        }
 6496
 6497        uint GetUTF16(uint[] text, int i)
 06498        {
 06499            uint unicode = 0;
 06500            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i]) << 12;
 06501            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i + 1]) << 8;
 06502            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i + 2]) << 4;
 06503            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i + 3]);
 06504            return unicode;
 06505        }
 6506
 6507        uint GetUTF16(TextBackingContainer text, int i)
 06508        {
 06509            uint unicode = 0;
 06510            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i]) << 12;
 06511            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i + 1]) << 8;
 06512            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i + 2]) << 4;
 06513            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i + 3]);
 06514            return unicode;
 06515        }
 6516
 6517        bool IsValidUTF32(TextBackingContainer text, int index)
 06518        {
 06519            for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++)
 06520            {
 06521                uint c = text[index + i];
 06522                if (!(c >= '0' && c <= '9' || c >= 'a' && c <= 'f' || c >= 'A' && c <= 'F'))
 06523                    return false;
 06524            }
 6525
 06526            return true;
 06527        }
 6528
 6529        uint GetUTF32(uint[] text, int i)
 06530        {
 06531            uint unicode = 0;
 06532            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i]) << 28;
 06533            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i + 1]) << 24;
 06534            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i + 2]) << 20;
 06535            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i + 3]) << 16;
 06536            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i + 4]) << 12;
 06537            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i + 5]) << 8;
 06538            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i + 6]) << 4;
 06539            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i + 7]);
 06540            return unicode;
 06541        }
 6542
 6543        uint GetUTF32(TextBackingContainer text, int i)
 06544        {

 06553            unicode += HexToInt((char)text[i + 7]);

 6558        /// <summary>

 6564        protected Color32 HexCharsToColor(char[] hexChars, int tagCount)
 06565        {
 06566            if (tagCount == 4)
 06567            {
 06568                byte r = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[1]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[1]));
 06569                byte g = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[2]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[2]));
 06570                byte b = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[3]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[3]));
 6571
 06572                return new Color32(r, g, b, 255);
 6573            }
 06574            else if (tagCount == 5)
 06575            {
 06576                byte r = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[1]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[1]));
 06577                byte g = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[2]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[2]));

 6580
 06581                return new Color32(r, g, b, a);
 6582            }
 06583            else if (tagCount == 7)
 06584            {
 06585                byte r = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[1]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[2]));
 06586                byte g = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[3]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[4]));

 6588
 06589                return new Color32(r, g, b, 255);
 6590            }
 06591            else if (tagCount == 9)
 06592            {
 06593                byte r = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[1]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[2]));
 06594                byte g = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[3]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[4]));

 6597
 06598                return new Color32(r, g, b, a);
 6599            }
 06600            else if (tagCount == 10)
 06601            {
 06602                byte r = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[7]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[7]));
 06603                byte g = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[8]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[8]));
 06604                byte b = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[9]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[9]));
 6605
 06606                return new Color32(r, g, b, 255);
 6607            }
 06608            else if (tagCount == 11)
 06609            {
 06610                byte r = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[7]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[7]));
 06611                byte g = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[8]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[8]));

 6614

 6616            }
 06617            else if (tagCount == 13)
 06618            {
 06619                byte r = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[7]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[8]));
 06620                byte g = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[9]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[10]));

 06625            else if (tagCount == 15)

 6633            }

 06635            return new Color32(255, 255, 255, 255);

 6639        /// <summary>

 06659                byte g = (byte)(HexToInt(hexChars[startIndex + 3]) * 16 + HexToInt(hexChars[startIndex + 4]));

 06666            return s_colorWhite;

 6670        /// <summary>
 6671        /// Method which returns the number of parameters used in a tag attribute and populates an array with such value
 6672        /// </summary>
 6673        /// <param name="chars">Char[] containing the tag attribute and data</param>
 6674        /// <param name="startIndex">The index of the first char of the data</param>
 6675        /// <param name="length">The length of the data</param>
 6676        /// <param name="parameters">The number of parameters contained in the Char[]</param>
 6677        /// <returns></returns>
 6678        int GetAttributeParameters(char[] chars, int startIndex, int length, ref float[] parameters)
 06679        {
 06680            int endIndex = startIndex;
 06681            int attributeCount = 0;
 6682
 06683            while (endIndex < startIndex + length)
 06684            {
 06685                parameters[attributeCount] = ConvertToFloat(chars, startIndex, length, out endIndex);
 6686
 06687                length -= (endIndex - startIndex) + 1;
 06688                startIndex = endIndex + 1;
 6689
 06690                attributeCount += 1;
 06691            }
 6692
 06693            return attributeCount;
 06694        }
 6695
 6696
 6697        /// <summary>
 6698        /// Extracts a float value from char[] assuming we know the position of the start, end and decimal point.
 6699        /// </summary>
 6700        /// <param name="chars"></param>
 6701        /// <param name="startIndex"></param>
 6702        /// <param name="length"></param>
 6703        /// <returns></returns>
 6704        protected float ConvertToFloat(char[] chars, int startIndex, int length)
 06705        {
 6706            int lastIndex;

 6712        /// <summary>
 6713        /// Extracts a float value from char[] given a start index and length.
 6714        /// </summary>
 6715        /// <param name="chars"></param> The Char[] containing the numerical sequence.
 6716        /// <param name="startIndex"></param> The index of the start of the numerical sequence.
 6717        /// <param name="length"></param> The length of the numerical sequence.
 6718        /// <param name="lastIndex"></param> Index of the last character in the validated sequence.
 6719        /// <returns></returns>
 6720        protected float ConvertToFloat(char[] chars, int startIndex, int length, out int lastIndex)
 06721        {
 06722            if (startIndex == 0)
 06723            {
 06724                lastIndex = 0;
 06725                return Int16.MinValue;
 6726            }
 6727
 06728            int endIndex = startIndex + length;
 6729
 06730            bool isIntegerValue = true;
 06731            float decimalPointMultiplier = 0;
 6732
 6733            // Set value multiplier checking the first character to determine if we are using '+' or '-'
 06734            int valueSignMultiplier = 1;
 06735            if (chars[startIndex] == '+')
 06736            {
 06737                valueSignMultiplier = 1;
 06738                startIndex += 1;
 06739            }
 06740            else if (chars[startIndex] == '-')
 06741            {
 06742                valueSignMultiplier = -1;
 06743                startIndex += 1;
 06744            }
 6745
 06746            float value = 0;
 6747
 06748            for (int i = startIndex; i < endIndex; i++)
 06749            {
 06750                uint c = chars[i];
 6751
 06752                if (c >= '0' && c <= '9' || c == '.')
 06753                {
 06754                    if (c == '.')
 06755                    {
 06756                        isIntegerValue = false;
 06757                        decimalPointMultiplier = 0.1f;
 06758                        continue;
 6759                    }
 6760
 6761                    //Calculate integer and floating point value
 06762                    if (isIntegerValue)
 06763                        value = value * 10 + (c - 48) * valueSignMultiplier;
 6764                    else
 06765                    {
 06766                        value = value + (c - 48) * decimalPointMultiplier * valueSignMultiplier;
 06767                        decimalPointMultiplier *= 0.1f;
 06768                    }
 6769
 06770                    continue;
 6771                }
 06772                else if (c == ',')
 06773                {
 06774                    if (i + 1 < endIndex && chars[i + 1] == ' ')
 06775                        lastIndex = i + 1;
 6776                    else
 06777                        lastIndex = i;
 6778
 6779                    // Make sure value is within reasonable range.
 06780                    if (value > 32767)
 06781                        return Int16.MinValue;
 6782
 06783                    return value;
 6784                }
 06785            }
 6786
 06787            lastIndex = endIndex;
 6788
 6789            // Make sure value is within reasonable range.
 06790            if (value > 32767)
 06791                return Int16.MinValue;
 6792
 06793            return value;
 06794        }
